about.title: About Minion
about.missionText: We believe every person deserves secure, transparent, and legally binding authorisation workflows — without paper, without ambiguity.
about.p1: In Sweden, delegating authority to act on someone's behalf in business contexts — signing contracts, accessing financial accounts, representing in HR matters — typically requires paper-based power of attorney documents.
about.p2: These documents are slow to produce, difficult to verify, frequently lost, and prone to fraud. A bank employee has no reliable way to confirm that the person standing in front of them is actually authorised to act.
about.p3: Minion replaces paper entirely. Every delegation is created digitally, signed by both parties using Swedish BankID, archived for 7 years per Swedish law, and verifiable in real time by any third party.
about.v1Desc: Every action is authenticated with BankID. Data is encrypted at rest and in transit.
about.v2Desc: Full audit trail for every delegation event. Nothing is hidden.
about.v3Desc: Complex legal workflows made accessible to everyone with a Swedish BankID.
about.v4Desc: GDPR compliant. Built to Swedish legal standards including Lag (2016:561).

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Everything you need to manage delegations securely and compliantly.
services.s1Desc: Create, manage and revoke delegations with real-time status tracking. Support for multiple operation types per delegation in a single signed document.
services.s2Desc: Both grantor and delegate sign with Swedish BankID. Signatures are embedded in PDF/A archival documents. Non-repudiable and court-admissible.
services.s3Desc: Every delegation gets a unique QR code. Third parties verify without needing a Minion account. Full audit trail for every scan.
services.s4Desc: In-app, email and WhatsApp notifications for every delegation lifecycle event and credit balance alert.
services.s5Desc: Immutable, timestamped audit trail. Admin dashboard with advanced filtering and CSV export for compliance reporting.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees.
pricing.creditsNote: 1 credit = 1 delegation document, BankID signing included.
pricing.a1: One credit is consumed when you create a delegation document. The credit covers the BankID signing by both parties and document archiving.
pricing.a2: Yes. API plan changes take effect at the next billing cycle. Credit bundles are one-time purchases with no expiry.
pricing.a3: All prices are shown excluding Swedish VAT (25%). VAT will be added at checkout.

security.title: Security & Compliance
security.subtitle: Built on the most trusted digital identity infrastructure in Sweden.
security.bankidText: BankID is Sweden's leading electronic identification solution, used by over 8.5 million Swedes. A BankID signature is legally equivalent to a handwritten signature under Swedish law and the EU eIDAS regulation.
security.gdprText: We process personal data under Art. 6(1)(b) (contract performance) and Art. 6(1)(c) (legal obligation). Personal numbers are encrypted at rest. Users can export or delete their data at any time from the profile page.
security.storageText: All data is stored on Microsoft Azure servers in the EU region. Encryption: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. Signed delegation documents are archived for 7 years as required by Swedish law.
security.archiveText: Signed PDF/A documents are archived for 7 years per Swedish law requirements. After the retention period, documents are anonymised rather than deleted to maintain legal integrity.
security.dpoText: For data protection enquiries contact: privacy@minion.se

integration.step3: Receive your API key and secret

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Minion.

items.a: Minion is a SaaS platform for creating, signing and managing legally-binding delegation (power of attorney) documents using Swedish BankID. Both the grantor and delegate sign digitally, and documents can be verified in real time by third parties.

items.q: What is BankID and do I need it?
items.a: BankID is Sweden's electronic identification system used by banks, the Swedish Tax Agency, healthcare and most major institutions. Both the person granting authority and the person receiving it need a Swedish BankID to use Minion.

items.q: Is a Minion delegation legally binding in Sweden?
items.a: Yes. A BankID signature is legally equivalent to a handwritten signature under Swedish law and the EU eIDAS regulation. Signed documents are archived for 7 years.

items.q: What happens when a delegation expires?
items.a: Expired delegations are automatically marked as Expired and can no longer be used for verification. The signed document remains in the archive.
One credit is consumed when a delegation document is successfully created and signed. Credits are not refunded if a delegation is later revoked or expires.

items.q: Can I use Minion without a BankID?
items.a: No. Swedish BankID is required for both creating and accepting delegations. This is intentional — it ensures every delegation has a legally verifiable digital identity behind it.

items.q: How does the Verify API work?
items.a: Third-party companies apply for API access, receive a key and secret, and can then call our REST API with a delegation QR code to receive real-time validity data and optionally download the signed PDF document.

items.q: What data does Minion store about me?
items.a: We store your name, personal number (encrypted), email and phone (if provided), delegation history, and signed documents. We never sell your data. See our Privacy Policy for full details.
Yes. You can delete your account from the profile page. Note that signed delegation documents must be retained for 7 years per Swedish law — these are anonymised rather than deleted.

items.q: How long are signed documents archived?
items.a: 7 years, as required by Swedish law. After the retention period, documents are anonymised.

items.q: What happens if I run out of credits mid-delegation?
items.a: You cannot create a new delegation without sufficient credits. You can purchase a credit bundle at any time and immediately create delegations.

Yes. Data is stored in the EU (Azure), personal numbers are encrypted, users have full access/deletion rights, and we have a documented lawful basis for all processing. Contact privacy@minion.se for DPO enquiries.
